wordplay_note: Marching to a different drummer through teleportation
card_description: Herb Sousa (meaning "Sousa = marching music composer") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Lies Inc.*. Character involved with Trails of Hoffman teleportation company. Name note: Marching to a different drummer through teleportation. Teleportation as emigration — the lie of the promised land. First appears in *Lies Inc.*.

reference.brief: Character involved with Trails of Hoffman teleportation company
reference.significance: Teleportation as emigration — the lie of the promised land
